ns0:entry.ns0:title: BOINC/boinc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BOINC/boinc
Language: php
Open-source software for volunteer computing and grid computing.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Dolibarr/dolibarr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Dolibarr/dolibarr
Language: php
Dolibarr ERP CRM is a modern software package to manage your company or foundation's activity (contacts, suppliers, invoices, orders, stocks, agenda, accounting, ...). it's an open source Web application (written in PHP) designed for businesses of any sizes, foundations and freelancers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: HiEventsDev/Hi.Events
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HiEventsDev/Hi.Events
Language: php
Open-source event management and ticket selling platform — perfect for concerts, conferences, and everything in between 🎟️ If you find this project helpful, please consider giving us a star ⭐️

ns0:entry.ns0:title: KhronosGroup/glTF-Sample-Assets
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/KhronosGroup/glTF-Sample-Assets
Language: php
An assortment of assets that demonstrate features and capabilities of the glTF format

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MlgmXyysd/Xiaomi-HyperOS-BootLoader-Bypass
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MlgmXyysd/Xiaomi-HyperOS-BootLoader-Bypass
Language: php
A PoC that exploits a vulnerability to bypass the Xiaomi HyperOS community restrictions of BootLoader unlocked account bindings.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PrestaShop/PrestaShop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PrestaShop/PrestaShop
Language: php
PrestaShop is the universal open-source software platform to build your e-commerce solution.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/WordPress
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/WordPress
Language: php
WordPress, Git-ified. This repository is just a mirror of the WordPress subversion repository. Please do not send pull requests. Submit pull requests to https://github.com/WordPress/wordpress-develop and patches to https://core.trac.wordpress.org/ instead.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bagisto/bagisto
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bagisto/bagisto
Language: php
Free and open source laravel eCommerce platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coollabsio/coolify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coollabsio/coolify
Language: php
An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: firefly-iii/firefly-iii
ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Home of the Joomla! Content Management System

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kimai/kimai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kimai/kimai
Language: php
Kimai is the #1 open-source time-tracking application. From freelancers to companies and organisations - everyone can manage timesheets, generate reports, create invoices and so much more... Web-based multi-user application, available as On-Premise or SaaS version: https://www.kimai.org

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nextcloud/all-in-one
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nextcloud/all-in-one
Language: php
📦 The official Nextcloud installation method. Provides easy deployment and maintenance with most features included in this one Nextcloud instance.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opensourcepos/opensourcepos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opensourcepos/opensourcepos
Language: php
Open Source Point of Sale is a web based point of sale application written in PHP using CodeIgniter framework. It uses MySQL as the data back end and has a Bootstrap 3 based user interface.
